name: Absorber
short_description: Absorber: An addictive idle RPG adventure in which you absorb the strength and abilities of defeated enemies. Explore a fantasy world, defeat challenging enemies. Immerse yourself in the unique gameplay. Will you rise to become the ultimate absorber?
detailed_description:
About the Game

In "Absorber", you dive into a captivating Idle-RPG adventure where you absorb the abilities and strengths of your defeated enemies. Not only is defeating the enemies important, but also the order in which you challenge them to gain strategic advantages. The further you progress, the more challenges and features are offered to you, enticing you to experience the game over and over again.

Key Features

  • Unique Absorption Mechanic: Adopt the abilities and strengths of your defeated enemies
  • Skill Trees: Invest prestige points and design your individual path
  • Prestige Mode: Each new run brings fresh challenges and features
  • Stylish Graphics: hand-drawn sprites
  • Relaxing Background Music: Ideal for relaxing and watching your character's progress

Who is this game for?

Absorber is for players who want to sit back and watch as their character grows, without having to actively delve into the gameplay. If you are a fan of Idle games and love the strategic aspect of RPGs, then this game is just right for you!
